data.body: JOE-DEBUG PHASE 1 COMPLETE — root cause of plan-review INDETERMINATE confirmed. rebar routes LLM calls through the headroom proxy (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=127.0.0.1:8787). headroom corrupts rebar's AGENTIC Pass-2 verify tool-loop requests -> empty stream -> pydantic_ai UnexpectedModelBehavior -> caught at runner.py:333 as terminal LLMUnavailableError (no retry) -> gate_dispatch.py:373 verify_failed=True -> orchestrator.py:487-495 fail-closed INDETERMINATE. DISCRIMINATING EXPERIMENT: same epic ac1b, THROUGH headroom => verify_requests=0, verify_error=empty-stream, INDETERMINATE; BYPASSING headroom (env -u ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL) => verify_requests=20, verify_error=None, verdict=PASS (advisory:10). Single-turn verify + simple/large tool-use streaming all pass through headroom; only rebar's real agentic tool-LOOP request (carries crushed tool_results / cache_control) breaks. RTK (rust hook) is bash-command-only, NOT involved. Prior PASS at 5f99d750e predates headroom being enabled. Legitimacy: genuine defect (agentic verify path non-functional behind headroom; every code-grounded ticket un-claimable).
